Appearance

Aurus3D Menus for Minecraft

A packet-based 3D menu system for Paper servers (1.20.1+). Build interactive, animated menus using simple YAML.

Get Started
GitHub

3D Packet-Based Menus

Create floating menus with text, buttons, items, blocks, entities, and player NPCs — all rendered client-side via packets.

Smooth Animations

Animate components with math formulas — scale, rotate, and move using sin, cos, and more via exp4j expressions.

PlaceholderAPI Support

Use any PAPI placeholder in text fields and actions. Store player input with INPUT components and access them via PAPI.

Aurus — Packet-based 3D menus for Minecraft
